title: How to Beat AI in Your Dev Job Search
summary: AWS Developers video argues that networking and personal branding are more effective than mass resume applications in tech job searches when AI screens candidates. It frames AI as a labor market disruptor that evolves roles rather than eliminating them, and recommends hands-on learning through open source and SaaS projects for junior developers.
writeup: This AWS Developers video makes the case that networking and personal branding outperform mass resume submissions in a tech job search where AI screens applicants. It frames AI as a labor market disruptor that reshapes developer roles rather than eliminating them. The concrete takeaway for junior developers: build skills through hands-on work on open source and SaaS projects, and invest in visibility over volume applications.
